title: Senior Executive / Executive, Genting Rewards
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Execute loyalty campaigns, strategic partnerships and promotions (e.g., point multipliers, tier upgrades, special events, travel, lifestyle, or merchant partners)
  • Execute strategic partnerships (e.g., travel, lifestyle, or merchant partners) for the loyalty ecosystem
  • Plan rewards catalogs and ensure a seamless redemption experience for members
  • Monitor program effectiveness and prepare reports on member engagements, redemptions, and campaign success
  • Perform cohort analysis, drive insights for ongoing program refinement, and analyze customer behavior and segment performance
  • Support and test loyalty system enhancements, app updates, or campaign set-ups
  • Execution of activities and functions with relevant support departments on guest retention
  • Perform all duties in compliance with the relevant Regulatory Authority and other statutory requirements, department and company policies, standard operation procedures, internal controls and service standards

Job Requirements

  • Meet the relevant Regulatory Authority's statutory requirement of minimum 21 years of age
  • Diploma/Degree in marketing, Business Administration, or a related field
  • Prior experience in partnership engagement is a plus
  • Proficiency with CRM systems and digital marketing platforms is desirable
  • Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple projects with tight deadlines
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams and build relationships with internal and external stakeholders
  • Minimum of 1 year’s experience in loyalty marketing, or CRM or related field. Candidates with more years of relevant experience may be considered for more senior roles.

postedCompany.description:
Resorts World Sentosa (RWS), Asia’s premium lifestyle destination resort, is located on Singapore’s resort island of Sentosa. Spanning 49 hectares, RWS is home to world-class attractions including Universal Studios Singapore, S.E.A. Aquarium, the Maritime Experiential Museum, Dolphin Island and Adventure Cove Waterpark. Complementing the adventure and adrenaline of its theme parks and attractions are six unique luxury hotels, the world-class Resorts World Convention Centre, a casino and the Asian flagship of a world-renowned destination spa. RWS offers award-winning dining experiences and exciting cuisines from around the world across its many renowned celebrity chef restaurants, establishing itself as a key player in Singapore’s vibrant and diverse dining scene and a leading gourmet destination in Asia for epicureans. The integrated resort also offers world-class entertainment, from original resident productions to concerts and public shows such as Crane Dance and Lake of Dreams. RWS has been named “Best Integrated Resort” since 2011 for nine consecutive years at the TTG Travel Awards which recognises the best of Asia-Pacific’s travel industry.

RWS is wholly owned by Genting Singapore, a company of the Genting Group. For more information, please visit www.rwsentosa.com.
postedCompany.name: RESORTS WORLD AT SENTOSA PTE. LTD.
